title: 恢复 broker 模块文件
description: 从 git HEAD 恢复已提交但被删除的 broker 模块文件，包括 __init__.py, persistence.py, json_broker.py, job.py, job_manager.py, event.py, message.py

criteria: git show HEAD:src/tflow/broker/__init__.py 恢复成功
所有 7 个 broker 文件存在于 src/tflow/broker/
python -c 'from tflow.broker import JobManager, JsonBroker' 无报错
convergence.verification: git checkout HEAD -- src/tflow/broker/ && python -c 'from tflow.broker import JobManager, JsonBroker'

implementation: 使用 git checkout HEAD -- src/tflow/broker/ 恢复所有文件
验证 broker/__init__.py 导出 JobManager, JsonBroker, BrokerPersistence
验证导入无循环依赖错误

commands: python -c 'from tflow.broker import JobManager, JsonBroker, BrokerPersistence; print("OK")'

reference.pattern: 遵循设计文档 4.2 节 broker 模块架构
